## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? Briefly describe the change and why it's needed. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] refactor: Code refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] style: Formatting, missing semicolons, etc.
- [ ] docs: Documentation only
- [ ] test: Adding or updating tests
- [ ] chore: Build process, dependencies, CI changes

<!-- Link the issue this PR addresses, e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards (ESLint + Prettier)
- [ ] I have run `npm run format` and committed formatted code
- [ ] `npm run lint:check` passes with no errors
- [ ] `npm run types` passes with no errors
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality (if applicable)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `npm run check-translations` passes (all locales are in sync)
- [ ] My commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (e.g. `feat: add poll filtering`)
- [ ] I have not committed any debug statements (`console.log`, `debugger`, `.only(...)`)
